apiKeys.title: API access
apiKeys.intro: Generate personal API keys to drive every admin action programmatically. Keys are yours alone and carry your full admin power — see the
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke this API key? Any integration using it will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.createdWarning: Copy this key now — it is shown only once and cannot be recovered. If you lose it, revoke it and generate a new one.

launcher.noApps: No apps assigned yet. Contact an administrator for access.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.intro: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
profile.revokeConfirm: Revoke this session? That device will be signed out of the portal and every linked app immediately. Your other sessions are not affected.

noAccess.title: No access
noAccess.notProvisionedBody: You signed in successfully, but your account has not been granted access to the {brand} portal yet. Please contact an administrator.
noAccess.bodySuffix: If you think this is a mistake, contact an administrator.

users.title: Users
users.mgmtWarning: ⚠ Logto Management API is not configured. You can manage ACP records, but creating / suspending / deleting users in Logto is disabled until LOGTO_M2M_* is set.

userNew.title: New user
userNew.emailMustMatch: The email must match an active allow rule.
userNew.logtoOff: Logto provisioning is off — the matching Logto account must exist separately.
userNew.emailTip: Must be a valid address AND match an active email allow rule (domain / exact / regex). Default-deny: anything not matched is rejected.
userNew.name: Name

usersImport.title: Import users
usersImport.intro: Upload a spreadsheet (.xlsx / .xls / .csv) with column 1 = Email and column 2 = Name. Existing users are skipped.
usersImport.fileTip: First column Email, second column Name. A header row (e.g. "Email", "Name") is detected and skipped.
usersImport.autoRuleLabel: Auto-create an email exception rule for addresses that don't fit current allowed patterns
usersImport.autoRuleTip: For each email not already matched by an active allow rule, add an exact allow rule so the user can be created and can sign in. With this off, non-matching emails are skipped.
usersImport.roleTip: Only external roles (key starts with ext_) can be assigned in bulk, so an import can never grant a privileged role. Leave as none to assign no role.
usersImport.noExtRoles: No external (ext_) roles exist yet — create one first to assign a role in bulk.
usersImport.logtoFailed: created but Logto provisioning failed — follow up

reason.notAllowed: Email not on the allowlist (toggle off)

user.disableConfirm: Disable (offboard) this user? Sessions are revoked immediately and they are suspended in Logto. Reversible via Enable.
user.deleteConfirm: Permanently DELETE this user? This removes the portal record AND the Logto account, revokes sessions, and cannot be undone.
user.name: Name
user.emailImmutableTip: Email is the immutable identity key (it is what Logto asserts at sign-in). To correct it, delete this user and create a new one.
user.overrideHint: Gate-level access only: allow lets the user reach the app (finer in-app control is the app's own concern); deny blocks the whole app and beats any role grant.
user.accessPreview: Access preview — what can this user reach?

roles.title: Organizational roles
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role '{key}'? It will be removed from every user that holds it. Apps and grants are unaffected.
roles.keyTip: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens and underscores (e.g. sales). Must start with a letter or digit, max 64 chars. Permanent once created.

role.name: Name
role.structuralCannotRename: {key} is structural and cannot be renamed.
role.newKeyTip: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens and underscores; must start alphanumeric; max 64 chars. The key is rewritten on every user that holds this role.
role.renameConfirm: Rename the role key from '{key}' to the new value? Every user holding this role is updated automatically.
role.grantsHint: Holding this role lets a user reach each app below. This is coarse, gate-level access only — there is no per-app role; finer control is the app's own responsibility.

apps.title: Apps
apps.deleteConfirm: Delete app '{key}'? Its grants and any per-user overrides are removed too. The deployed app itself is not touched.
apps.keyTip: Also used as the URL path segment /apps/<key>/, so keep it tight: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens and underscores; must start with a letter or digit; max 64 chars. Permanent once created.
apps.footnote: The app is served at /apps/<key> on every portal host. Registering generates a per-app proxy_secret. Public paths are edited on the app's page. Access is coarse, gate-level only — granting the app lets a user reach it; finer in-app control is the app's own responsibility.

app.proxySecretLabel: Proxy secret (set as the app's MENAGERAI_PROXY_SECRET):
app.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate? The app must be updated with the new secret or it will reject all traffic.
app.name: Name
app.defaultUrlTip: If set, the launcher links to this app on this exact domain instead of relative to whichever portal host the user is on. Choices come from the DEFAULT_BASE_URLS env var.
app.accessNote: Access here is coarse, gate-level only: granting this app (via a role or a per-user allow) lets the user reach it. Any finer-grained, in-app control is the app's own responsibility, decided inside the app from the forwarded user identity (email).
app.publicPathsTip: Array of {"method","pattern"}. method: * or one of GET POST PUT PATCH DELETE HEAD OPTIONS. pattern: app-relative, must start with / and may use glob ** (e.g. /api/public/**). These paths skip authentication entirely — keep them tight. Example: [{"method":"GET","pattern":"/api/public/**"}]
app.renameConfirm:
Rename the app key from '{key}' to the new value?

This also changes the URL to /apps/<new key>. You MUST update the deployment (Coolify FQDN path + APP_BASE_PATH + the gateway route) to match, or the app becomes unreachable. Grants, overrides and usage history are migrated automatically.
app.newKeyTip: The key is also the /apps/<key> URL path segment. Renaming it rewrites every role grant, user override and usage row — but you must also repoint the deployment (Coolify path + APP_BASE_PATH + gateway middleware) to /apps/<new key>, or the app will 404.
app.deployWarning: ⚠ The deployment routing (Coolify FQDN path, APP_BASE_PATH, and the menagerai-auth@file route) must be updated to the new /apps/<key> path, or the app will be unreachable.

email.title: Email allow rules
email.intro: Default deny. A user can only be created if their email matches an active rule.
email.deleteConfirm: Delete this email rule permanently? Existing users are unaffected; this only changes who can be added going forward.
email.typeTip: exact: the whole email address must match. domain: the part after @ must match exactly (no subdomains).
email.hintDomain: Matches any address whose domain is exactly this (e.g. anyone@example.com). A leading @ is optional. Subdomains do NOT match.
email.hintExact: Matches this one full email address only (case-insensitive).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.intro: Top {n} apps and users by activity over the last {days} days. Each card links through to its full details.

flash.profileSyncFailed: Profile saved, but syncing the name to Logto failed — see logs
flash.superadminNoDisable: The superadmin account cannot be disabled
flash.superadminNoDelete: The superadmin account cannot be deleted
flash.logtoDeleteFailed: Logto deletion failed — see logs; ACP record kept
flash.roleKeyStructural: The {role} role key is structural and cannot be renamed
flash.roleKeyExists: A role with that key already exists
flash.invalidDefaultBaseUrl: Default URL must be one of the configured DEFAULT_BASE_URLS
flash.appKeyExists: An app with that key already exists
flash.appKeyRenamed: App key renamed — update the deployment's path/APP_BASE_PATH to /apps/{key} or the app will be unreachable
flash.secretRegenerated: Secret regenerated — update the app env var MENAGERAI_PROXY_SECRET
flash.importParseFailed: Could not read the spreadsheet — check the file format
flash.importEmpty: No data rows found in the file
flash.importRoleNotExternal: Only external (ext_) roles can be assigned in bulk

demo.bannerIdle: Public demo — the database resets a few minutes after the first sign-in.
demo.loginIntro: Pick a persona to explore the portal from their point of view. No password — this is a throwaway demo that resets itself.

persona.ada: Superadmin: reaches every app and the full admin panel.
persona.bo: A single role grant (Analyst) — sees Pulse only; everything else is denied by default.
persona.cam: Editor role plus a per-user allow — sees Wiki and Desk.
persona.dee: Support role, but a per-user deny revokes Wiki — sees Desk only.

validate.pathNotObject: each public path must be an object
validate.invalidEffect: effect must be allow or deny
